## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `add` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — build / config / deps

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] New parser behaviour is covered by a test in `internal/parser/`
- [ ] Example `.mmd` file added or updated if applicable
